name: What are the highest-priority voice search questions I should answer on my site first?
description: Prioritize urgent questions about hours, pricing, availability, service area, and how to get started.

mainEntity.name: What are the highest-priority voice search questions I should answer on my site first?

acceptedAnswer.text: Start with the questions that reflect urgent intent, such as hours, pricing, availability, and service area. Those are the kinds of spoken searches most likely to lead to immediate contact.
acceptedAnswer.description: Prioritize urgent questions about hours, pricing, availability, service area, and how to get started.
